name: Fruit & Nut Ginger Bread from Mary Killen
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour with baking soda and spices.
2. Cream margarine and sugar, add treacle and mix well.
3. Beat in eggs a little at a time with the flour mixture.
4. Add buttermilk to form a soft consistency.
5. Stir in fruit and nuts.
6. Turn mixture into a well greased and lined 2 lb. loaf tin.
7. Bake at 160°C (320°F, gas mark 3) for 75 minutes.
